name: Western Union
description_short: Western Union in Sacramento, CA at 1600 W El Camino Ave provides check cashing and money transfer services.
description_long:
Western Union's Sacramento location is at 1600 W El Camino Ave in a standalone building. The branch operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM and Saturday from 10 AM to 4 PM, with no Sunday service. This convenient setup serves Sacramento area customers with extended weekday hours.

This W El Camino location in Sacramento, CA handles check cashing, wire transfers, and bill payments. For details about current services, fees, or processing times, call 916-643-2274 and speak with staff. They can guide you through transaction options available at this specific branch.

Sacramento residents planning to use this Western Union branch should bring a valid government ID. The extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM) accommodate working schedules, but the branch closes at 4 PM on Saturday and doesn't open on Sunday. This location provides essential financial services without requiring a bank account.
address: 1600 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

company_info.headquarters: 1600 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA 95833

pros: 24/7 online money transfer initiation through website and mobile platform
Extensive retail network across the US with major grocers and convenience stores for cash pickup
Multiple language support (6 languages including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Money transfer tracking system allowing customers to monitor transfers in real-time
Rewards program incentivizing repeat customer usage
Multiple service offerings beyond transfers including bill payment, mobile top-up, and money orders
Inmate payment services available for incarcerated individuals
cons: Service completion dependent on agent location hours, which vary (typically 8 PM-11:59 PM closing)
Fees, exchange rates, and specific transfer timelines not disclosed on website; customers must visit locations or contact for pricing
Some payment methods (Orange wallet noted) experience temporary unavailability and service interruptions
Money order services limited at certain locations (e.g., Circle K #0682 offers money orders only)
Geolocation feature requires browser permissions; otherwise customers receive less accurate location results
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers needing accessible cash transfer services without a traditional bank account
International remittance senders supporting family members in other countries
Individuals requiring bill payment services and preferring in-person transaction methods
Consumers in rural or underserved areas with limited banking infrastructure but access to major retail grocers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for unbanked consumers and international remittance senders who need reliable access to cash transfer services through convenient retail locations. The main caveat is that pricing, fees, and transfer speeds are not publicly disclosed on the website—customers must contact specific agent locations or use the price estimation tool, and service completion always depends on agent location hours rather than true 24/7 availability.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 web and mobile)
In-store cash pickup at retail agent locations
meta_description: Western Union at 1600 W El Camino Ave, Sacramento, CA. Check cashing and money transfers—open until 7 PM weekdays.
